title: Electrobyte Labs
subtitle: Completed May 2024
subheader: Over the summer, I started a small business with my cofounder Joey Harounian, called Electrobyte Labs. Its goal is to bring computer engineering (specifically PC building) to our local town. Additionally, we plan on selling custom-made keyboards through a keyboard manufacturer connection.

content.value: Much of the work we've done has been to set up a storefront and a website. We've partnered with LongWings EDU, a local afterschool education center, to offer classes teaching students the basics of PC building.

Since then, we've decided to end this company, due to lack of support from other members, as well as scheduling issues preventing me for dedicating as much work as I wanted to into development. I've learned a lot from the experience, and I hope to potentially work more within the consumer electronics space in the future.
